global_styles.spacing_philosophy: Breathable pacing. 2-3x SaaS spacing. Generous negative space.
global_styles.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm for subtle softening. Sharp, architectural edges preferred.
global_styles.shadows: Ambient, diffuse shadows only for floating UI. Images remain flat and integrated.
global_styles.image_treatment: Large, full-bleed images or carefully framed asymmetrical grids. Captions should be minimalist, placed outside the image frame or on a pure white/black solid block.
global_styles.testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight font-serif text-ink
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight font-serif text-ink
hierarchy.body_large: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-light leading-relaxed font-sans text-body_neutral
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-sans text-warm_gold
hierarchy.caption: text-sm font-sans text-slate italic

layout_and_grids.general: Single column editorial flow with dramatic split-screen interruptions. Never center-everything. Asymmetrical balance.
layout_and_grids.max_width: max-w-7xl mx-auto for content, full-bleed w-full for hero imagery and scrubbers.
layout_and_grids.pacing: py-24 or py-32 for section containers.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. bg-ink text-paper hover:bg-ink/80 transition-colors px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
components.captions: Minimalist, placed outside the image frame or on a pure white/black solid block.
components.nav_sticky: Sticky subtle section-nav. fixed right-8 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex-col gap-4 hidden lg:flex mix-blend-difference

interaction_patterns.sticky_nav: Vertical dot or line indicators pinned to the right edge. Silent tracking of active section.
interaction_patterns.scrubber: Scroll-linked sequence player mapping scroll progress to WebP frame index. Sticky while scrolling.
interaction_patterns.slider: Drag-to-compare before/after with a thin 1px vertical line and minimalist handle.
interaction_patterns.lightbox: Full-screen dark overlay (bg-ink/95) to focus entirely on the image.
interaction_patterns.reveal: Fade up and gentle parallax on scroll for text blocks and images.

motion_system.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll is mandatory for premium momentum.
motion_system.transitions: Restrained, editorial. 0.8s ease-[0.25,1,0.5,1]. Avoid bouncy/SaaS physics.

sections.title: Poster First Viewport
sections.layout: Full viewport height (100vh). Steeple image prominently placed. Clean typographic Locke & Ladder and Christ Church lockup. Brighter, welcoming.

sections.title: Sanctuary Leak & Repair vs Replace
sections.layout: Calm, plainspoken text left, labeled diagram/proof right. High negative space. Roof rot proof displayed analytically.

sections.title: JobNimbus Evidence
sections.layout: Edge-to-edge featured tiles with horizontal scrolling rail. Click to expand lightbox. Dark background to contrast with previous section.

sections.title: Material Transition & Brava Gallery
sections.layout: Editorial text explaining weak reinvestment in cedar. Reveal Brava as the better path. Followed by a hero-changing Brava gallery (17 photos).

sections.title: Aspen Light Study Scrubber
sections.layout: Sticky container pinning to viewport. Scrolling scrubs through the 90-frame webp sequence. Subtle typography overlay.

sections.title: Cedar-to-Brava Visualizer
sections.layout: Two stacked react-compare-slider instances. 1. Campus view. 2. Steeple view. Thin elegant drag handle.

sections.title: Roof System Exploded Study
sections.layout: Editorial white board. One dominant visual + typographic statement mapping underlayment, ice/water shield, custom metals. Not a generic feature grid.

sections.title: Craftsmanship Proof
sections.layout: Snape before/after craftsmanship slider. Centered tightly with generous top/bottom padding.

sections.title: Team & Relationship
sections.layout: Editorial portrait layout. Real crew photos. Staggered grid. Focus on 'relationship-based long-game'.

sections.title: 1% GiveBack Program
sections.layout: Solid deep navy (#003B5C) background. Warm gold (#857650) accent text. Clear, unambiguous statement.

sections.title: Closing & Contact
sections.layout: One memorable conviction-led thought. Simple elegant form (name, email, role, note). Minimalist inputs (border-b only). Light backend endpoint.

do: Use massive, breathable margins (p-16 to p-32).
Treat typography like an art piece—track out overlines, tighten headings.
Rely on the provided high-quality photography as the primary structural element.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements (buttons, sliders, form fields).
Make it feel like a printed board packet brought to life.
Prioritize readability for an older demographic.
dont: No fake-construction aesthetic (no hazard tape, no rugged textures).
No emoji icons—stick to clean SVG (Lucide) if absolutely necessary.
No type that feels whacky, overtracked, or overcapitalized in body/headings.
Do not use generic typography (Inter, Roboto).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI entirely in raw React/Tailwind/Framer Motion. Avoid off-the-shelf Shadcn cards or sections.
Implement Lenis for smooth scroll globally.
Use react-compare-slider for the Before/After sections.
Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for the 90-frame Aspen light study scrubber.
Implement yet-another-react-lightbox for the JobNimbus evidence wall.
Ensure all fonts are loaded elegantly (Fraunces and Manrope from Google Fonts or similar).
Only use the provided local asset paths. Do not inject Unsplash placeholders.
